channel.title: Local-First on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Local-First on Arrans github.io

item.title: siyuan-note/siyuan
item.description: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

item.title: anyproto/anytype-ts
item.description: Official Anytype client for MacOS, Linux, and Windows

item.title: logseq/logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Download link: http://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases. roadmap: http://trello.com/b/8txSM12G/roadmap

item.title: streamich/json-joy
item.description: JSON CRDT, JSON CRDT Patch, JSON Patch+, JSON Predicate, JSON Pointer, JSON Expression, JSON Type

item.title: anyproto/any-sync
item.description: An open-source protocol designed to create high-performance, local-first, peer-to-peer, end-to-end encrypted applications that facilitate seamless collaboration among multiple users and devices
